items.title: When is the US flash S&P Global PMI for April and how could it affect EUR/USD?
items.summary: The preliminary United States (US) S&P Global Purchasing Managers’ Index (PMI) data for April is due for release today at 13:45 GMT.

items.title: USD: Energy shock view anchors DXY range – BBH
items.summary: Brown Brothers Harriman’s (BBH) Elias Haddad notes that higher crude Oil prices and rising global bond yields are supporting the US Dollar (USD), with USD firmer against major currencies.
items.title_ko: USD: 에너지 쇼크 뷰 앵커 DXY 범위 – BBH
items.summary_ko: Brown Brothers Harriman (BBH) 의 Elias Haddad는 원유 가격이 상승하고 글로벌 채권 수익률이 미국 달러 (USD) 를 지지하고 있으며 주요 통화에 대해 USD가 더 견고하다고 지적합니다.
